chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1424 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application. 04.09.2025 None present for the applicant. None present for the complainant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- None is present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
